toast.noAdminPrivileges: You do not have admin privileges. Contact your system administrator.
toast.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

users.title: Users
users.empty: No accounts registered yet. Users will appear here once they sign up.

banDialog.banDescription: Banning {email} will immediately end their session and prevent login. This can be reversed.
banDialog.unbanDescription: Unbanning {email} will restore their access to the platform.

impersonateDialog.title: Impersonate user
impersonateDialog.description: You are about to impersonate {email}. All actions will be logged.

toast.impersonationStarted: Impersonation started. Check the new session.

tenants.title: Tenants
tenants.empty: Your platform has no tenants yet. When users create accounts, their tenants will appear here.

deactivateDialog.title: Deactivate tenant
deactivateDialog.description: Deactivating {name} will prevent all members from accessing the platform. This can be reversed.

reactivateDialog.title: Reactivate tenant
reactivateDialog.description: Reactivating {name} will restore access for all members.

deactivateDialog.title: Deactivate tenant
deactivateDialog.description: Deactivating {name} will prevent all members from accessing the platform. This can be reversed.

billingOverview.emptyBilling: No billing activity yet. Billing metrics will appear once tenants subscribe to plans.

systemHealth.loadError: Failed to load data. Check the API server status and try again.

statusMessages.degraded: Some systems are experiencing elevated load.
